name: Goldenmoss
personality: Goldenmoss's @ eyes track memory allocations the way a tiny duck tracks bread crumbs — with total commitment and zero concept of when to stop. This tinyduck-hatted capybara debug-traces your application from boot to crash with methodical glee, though when the question is 'why does this even work,' it just blinks and trots away.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
